name: Girls und panzer OVA 1
description:
"Let's go buy swimsuits!"

―Anzu Kadotani

The first OVA episode "Water War" "Wōtā Wō" (ウォーター ウォー ! ) is a special episode aired on December 21, 2012. It takes place chronologically amidst the events of Episode 5.

🎖️ Anglerfish Team (Flag Tank — Panzer IV Ausf. H)

Main Crew / Protagonists

  • Miho Nishizumi — Commander
    Calm, kind, and strategic. The heart of Ōarai’s team and the person who brought them together. Compassionate leader who values teamwork over pride.

  • Saori Takebe — Radio Operator
    Energetic, talkative, and the team’s “big sister.” She’s the social glue, always teasing her friends and keeping morale high.

  • Hana Isuzu — Gunner
    Graceful, polite, and artistic. Loves flower arrangement and often compares tank combat to beauty and balance.

  • Yukari Akiyama — Loader
    Military enthusiast with endless excitement for tanks and tactics. She’s Miho’s biggest supporter and a walking encyclopedia of Sensha-dō.

  • Mako Reizei — Driver
    Sleepy, sarcastic, but incredibly skilled. She’s the team’s hidden powerhouse, often saving them with precise driving at the last second.

🐢 Turtle Team (Student Council — Panzer 38(t))

  • Anzu Kadotani — Commander
    Relaxed, playful, and cunning. Loves snacks and naps but is secretly very strategic and shrewd.

  • Yuzu Koyama — Radio Operator
    Gentle, kind, and acts as the responsible voice for the trio. Keeps Anzu and Momo balanced.

  • Momo Kawashima — Gunner/Loader
    Serious, loud, and hardworking. Takes everything too literally and often gets flustered, but means well.

🐦 Duck Team (Volleyball Club — Type 89B I-Go)

  • Satoko Nakajima — Commander
    Cheerful, determined, and somewhat hot-headed. Treats Sensha-dō like a team sport.

  • Ayumi Yamagou — Gunner
    Focused and competitive, with strong sports instincts.

  • Aya Ono — Loader
    Optimistic and always up for a challenge.

  • Momoga — Driver
    Quiet but dependable; often rolls her eyes at the others’ antics.

🐦 Hippo Team (History Club — StuG III Ausf. F)

  • Erika Itsumi’s lookalike group (not really Erika!)
    Actually led by:

    • Erika Itsumi parody joke aside — true commander is Noriko Isobe — Commander
      Passionate about WWII history; serious about historical accuracy in everything.

    • Akebi Sasaki — Gunner
      Loves trivia and battle reenactments.

    • Shizuko Hosoyamada — Loader
      Friendly, enjoys quoting famous generals.

    • Rumi Hosoya — Driver
      Calm and efficient; keeps the others grounded.

🐰 Rabbit Team (First-Year Students — M3 Lee)

  • Azusa Sawa — Commander
    Earnest, polite, and a bit shy; has a natural sense of leadership that grows under Miho’s guidance.

  • Aya Oono — Driver
    Clumsy but determined; loves being part of something bigger.

  • Karina Sakaguchi — Gunner
    Excitable and curious; easily distracted but learns quickly.

  • Aya Watanabe — Loader
    Quiet and observant; supports her friends silently.

  • Yuki Utsugi — Radio Operator
creator: litchfield
